pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit jakarta.annotation-api dependency as it is now provided by the JDK or Spring Boot starter parent in Java 21/Spring Boot 3.3+.
pom.xml.why_exists: The dependency is redundant in the new environment and may cause version conflicts or unnecessary bloat, though its removal is primarily a cleanup/polishment rather than a strict compile fix if the parent manages it.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace jackson-module-jaxb-annotations with jackson-module-jakarta-xmlbind-annotations to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Java 21/Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact `jackson-module-jaxb-annotations` is deprecated or incompatible with the Jakarta EE 10+ annotations used in Java 21/Spring Boot 3.3+, leading to runtime errors or missing class definitions for JAXB annotations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve compatibility issues between Lombok and MapStruct in newer versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct may fail to process Lombok-generated getters/setters correctly, leading to compilation errors or runtime null pointer exceptions in DTO mappings.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding to the annotation processor paths to ensure it is available during compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Similar to the dependency addition, the processor must be on the classpath for MapStruct to correctly interact with Lombok during annotation processing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the maven-compiler-plugin release flag to the java.version property to enforce Java 21 bytecode generation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the compiler might default to an older bytecode version or rely on source/target flags which are less strict, potentially causing runtime issues on Java 21 if older bytecode is generated.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to adopt the new Java 21 API.
Refactor instanceof check to use pattern matching for cleaner code.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE to Jakarta EE to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+ which uses the 'jakarta.*' namespace; using the old 'java.sun.com' namespace causes deployment failures or class loading errors as the container expects Jakarta annotations and descriptors.
